description: Deposit preauth commands — authorize and revoke deposit preauthorization by account or credential on XRPL accounts

userStories.title: deposit-preauth set command
userStories.description: As an account owner, I want to grant or revoke deposit preauthorization from the CLI so I can control who can send payments to my account when Deposit Authorization is enabled.
acceptanceCriteria: Read DepositPreauth docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/depositpreauth.md before implementing
Create src/commands/deposit-preauth.ts and register it in src/commands/index.ts and src/index.ts
xrpl deposit-preauth with exactly one of: --authorize <address>, --unauthorize <address>, --authorize-credential <issuer>, --unauthorize-credential <issuer>
--credential-type <string> (plain string, auto hex-encoded via convertStringToHex) — required when using --authorize-credential or --unauthorize-credential
--credential-type-hex <hex> (raw hex) — mutually exclusive with --credential-type
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
CLI exits with error if none of the four main flags are provided
CLI exits with error if more than one of the four main flags are provided
CLI exits with error if both --credential-type and --credential-type-hex are provided
CLI exits with error if --credential-type or --credential-type-hex is used without --authorize-credential or --unauthorize-credential
CLI exits with error if --authorize-credential or --unauthorize-credential is used without --credential-type or --credential-type-hex

tests/e2e/deposit-preauth/deposit-preauth.validation.test.ts: no main flag, multiple main flags, credential-type without credential flag, both credential-type flags, credential flag without credential-type (no network)
tests/e2e/deposit-preauth/deposit-preauth.set.test.ts: authorize account, unauthorize account, authorize by credential, unauthorize by credential; --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: deposit-preauth list command
userStories.description: As an account owner, I want to query the list of existing deposit preauthorizations so I can verify who is authorized to send payments.
acceptanceCriteria: xrpl deposit-preauth list <address> subcommand using account_objects RPC with type: 'deposit_preauth'
Default output: each preauth on its own line — 'Account: <address>' for account-based, 'Credential: <issuer> / <credential-type-decoded>' for credential-based
Shows 'No deposit preauthorizations.' if the account has none
--json outputs raw JSON
--node supported
tests/e2e/deposit-preauth/deposit-preauth.list.test.ts: authorize an account, verify it appears in list; authorize a credential, verify it appears; unauthorize and verify removal; --json
Typecheck passes
